sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 16

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 16:1
items.html: Two orders of clarifications apply to the MAN [Mayin Nukvin] in general. The first is at the time of the correction of Atzilut in the beginning: then all the MAN in general rose together with Atik to the Rosh [head] of SAG, and he clarified out of them the choicest, and what was regarded as refuse for him he gave to AA [Arich Anpin]; and AA clarified the best of them for himself, for his own building, and the refuse he gave to AVI [Aba ve Ima]; and likewise AVI clarified the best of them for their building, and the refuse they gave to ZON [Zeir Anpin and Nukva]; and likewise ZON clarified the best of them, and the refuse they gave to BYA [Beria, Yetzira, Assiya], to the discernments of the souls of the righteous — until Adam HaRishon clarified his share, and the remainder was actual refuse, for the dwelling of the Klipot [shells]. However, after the sin of Adam HaRishon, all his clarifications fell back from him and were mixed within the Klipot — they are the secret of all six hundred thousand souls in the world that dropped from him, as is known. Then the righteous in each and every generation began to clarify the discernments of their soul back out of the Klipot and to raise them as MAN to the Nukva of Atzilut, where they receive their correction; and the righteous receive from her their Mochin, in the secret of new souls renewed through the Zivug [coupling] of ZON.

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 16:2
items.html: From here onward a different order began in the matter of the clarifications of MAN. Since each and every Zivug must be preceded by the upper one above it, and likewise the upper one by the upper-upper, until the new Mochin belonging to that Zivug are drawn from Ein Sof, blessed be He — each one of the Partzufim up to Ein Sof, blessed be He, needs MAN upon which it couples, by means of the Mochin that each received from its own upper one, as is known. And these MAN ascend from below upward.

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 16:3
items.html: That is, there are two kinds of refuse. The first are the sparks and Kelim [vessels] that fell to BYA. The second are the Lights that cannot fall to BYA, as is known, for they are the Reshimot [records] of the Kelim, which must remain in Atzilut. Now, all the discernments of refuse that each and every Partzuf of the upper ones left behind — since at the time of their emanation they were not fit to join the building of their Partzufim — all this refuse fell and remained in the domain of the Nukva of Atzilut, for they can fall no further, being the discernment of the Lights that remained after their departure from their Kelim. Therefore, when the souls of the righteous raise the MAN of their share to the Nukva of Atzilut, there is in these MAN a share for all the upper Partzufim up to Ein Sof, blessed be He. For this is the rule: where the NHY [Netzah, Hod, Yesod] of the Kelim are missing, the GAR of the Lights are missing; and this applies to the whole collective. For because of the second Tzimtzum [restriction], Bina and ZON of the NHY of AK [Adam Kadmon] departed and became BYA, as is known; and this lack diminishes all the Partzufim of AK, all the more so after the breaking of the vessels and after the sin of Adam HaRishon. And although they are lower ones, nevertheless the filling of the lower ones restores the Lights of the upper ones, for every lower one is the discernment of the filling of its upper one, as is known.

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 16:4
items.html: (to the question) Therefore the Nukva raises the totality of all the MAN belonging to the upper ones, and she raises them to ZA [Zeir Anpin]; and ZA takes of them the lowest, inferior discernment attributed to his share, and all the choicest he raises to AVI; likewise AVI take of what is attributed to their discernment, and the choicest above their discernment they raise to AA; likewise AA takes his share alone, and all the choicest above his discernment he raises to Atik; and so in this way through all the Partzufim of AK. Thus an order was made here that is the reverse of the beginning, at the time of the start of the correction of Atzilut. For then every upper one clarified the choicest first for itself and gave the inferior to be clarified in its lower one, as above; whereas here the clarification began in the lower one, and every lower one takes the most inferior of the whole collective in its domain — that is, only of what relates to its own discernment; and since it is a lower one, its share in the MAN is lower and more inferior than all those above it. Therefore the more select and exalted than its discernment it raises to the upper ones, and so on in that order, until the Lights of Ein Sof, blessed be He, arrive; and the uppermost of them all lowers MAD [Mayin Duchrin, male waters] upon the MAN that its lower one raised to it, and imparts of its illumination to the lower one adjacent to it; and the lower one too lowers the MAD it received upon its own MAN, and imparts of its Mochin to the degree after it, and so on, until the Mochin come to the souls of the righteous, who were the first in the raising of the MAN. As has been explained.
